mapper.select: SELECT id, unit_id, username, password_hash, real_name, job_title, mobile, role, status, parent_user_id, level_no, tree_path, create_time, update_time, create_user, update_user, is_deleted FROM sys_user WHERE id = #{id} AND is_deleted = FALSE

SELECT id, unit_id, username, password_hash, real_name, job_title, mobile, role, status, parent_user_id, level_no, tree_path, create_time, update_time, create_user, update_user, is_deleted FROM sys_user WHERE username = #{username} AND is_deleted = FALSE

SELECT u.id, u.unit_id, su.unit_name, u.parent_user_id, u.level_no, u.tree_path, u.username, u.real_name, u.job_title, u.mobile, u.status, u.create_time, u.update_time FROM sys_user u LEFT JOIN sys_org_unit su ON su.id = u.unit_id WHERE u.id = #{id} AND u.is_deleted = FALSE
mapper.update: UPDATE sys_user SET unit_id = #{unitId}, real_name = #{realName}, job_title = #{jobTitle}, mobile = #{mobile}, status = #{status}, update_time = #{updateTime}, update_user = #{updateUser} WHERE id = #{id} AND is_deleted = FALSE
